description: Google Cloud Monitoring is an observability service for collecting, querying, and managing metrics, alerts, dashboards, and related monitoring resources. The `monitoring.googleapis.com` domain serves Cloud Monitoring API endpoints.
summary: monitoring.googleapis.com exposes a public MCP endpoint at `https://monitoring.googleapis.com/mcp` and a documented Cloud Monitoring REST API v3 on the same domain; REST auth details/spec URL were not confirmed from the retrieved pages.
